user_query: I'm a food blogger and I'm looking for unique and interesting ingredients to feature in my recipes. Can you provide me with a list of all available ingredients along with their nutritional information? Also, suggest a recipe that showcases one of these ingredients.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of unique and interesting ingredients available in the database.
Obtain nutritional information for each of the ingredients retrieved in Subtask 1.
Suggest a recipe that utilizes one of the ingredients from the list obtained in Subtask 1.
